_note: Single source of truth for dynamic counts (modules, workflows, tests, audit-evidence figures). Regenerated by ci/build_canonical_data.py from authoritative sources: audit/unified_audit_runner.cpp ALL_MODULES[] + SECTIONS[], .github/workflows/*.yml file count, docs/BITCOIN_CORE_BENCH_RESULTS.json. Never hand-edit values that have an authoritative source — extend ci/build_canonical_data.py instead.
ct_pipeline_breakdown_wording: 5 independent CT verification pipelines (3 CI-enforced: LLVM ct-verif, Valgrind taint, ct-prover; 2 manual/local: dudect, ARM64 native)
platform_targets_wording: Linux x86-64 / ARM64 / RISC-V 64 · macOS ARM64 · Windows x86-64 · Android ARM64 · WASM (experimental) · CUDA · OpenCL · Metal · ROCm/HIP (experimental) · embedded ARMv7
